mapper.select: select id, title, image_url, redirect_url, sort, status, created_at, updated_at from banner where status = 1 order by sort asc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into banner (title, image_url, redirect_url, sort, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{title}, #{imageUrl}, #{redirectUrl}, #{sort}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update banner set title = #{title}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, redirect_url = #{redirectUrl}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
